data.title: FIRST FINANCIAL BANK ANNOUNCES GREATER HOUSTON LEADERSHIP APPOINTMENTS
data.description: In Abilene, Texas on April 20, 2026, the Board of Directors of First Financial Bank, a subsidiary of First Financial Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIN), revealed significant senior leadership adjustments for the Greater Houston Region. Rodney Nabors has been appointed as the new Regional CEO as part of these changes.

data.title: TDH Holdings, Inc. Reports Full Year 2025 Audited Financial Results
data.description: On April 20, 2026, TDH Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PETZ) revealed its fiscal year 2025 financial results. The PRC-based company, specializing in operating and managing commercial real estate, announced significant figures for the year ending December 31, 2025.

data.title: Allison Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Allison Transmission Holdings Inc., a leading provider of high-performance mobility and work solutions tailored for modern industrial demands, revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the initial quarter of 2026. The announcement was made on April 20, 2026, in Indianapolis. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ALSN, is recognized globally for its innovative products. Stay tuned for further updates on the specific numbers and details from this financial report.

data.title: Cryoport to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 4, 2026
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on April 20, 2026, Cryoport, Inc. (Nasdaq: CYRX) disclosed details about its upcoming financial report. Cryoport is a prominent global company offering temperature-controlled supply chain services for the life sciences sector. The company will share its financial results for the specified period.

data.title: Hemlo Mining Corp. Announces Conditional Approval to Graduate to the Toronto Stock Exchange
data.description: Hemlo Mining Corp. (TSXV: HMMC) has been approved for uplisting alongside Canada's top gold producers. The Company will list its common shares on the Toronto Stock Exchange, marking a significant milestone in its growth. This move reflects Hemlo Mining's increasing prominence in the industry as it joins the ranks of premier gold producers.

data.title: Washington Trust Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Westerly, Rhode Island, on April 20, 2026, Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: WASH) announced its first quarter 2026 financial results. The company reported a net income of $12.6 million for the quarter, translating to $0.66 per diluted share. This figure marks a decrease from the previous year's first quarter net income of $16.0 million, or $0.83 per diluted share.

data.title: Harmonic Announces Reporting Date for First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Harmonic, a company listed on the NASDAQ under the symbol HLIT, has disclosed that it is set to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 after the markets close on May 11, 2026. Following the release, a live webcast will be conducted at 2:00 p.m. PT on the same day to delve into the performance figures and other significant aspects of the Company's progress.

data.title: Leidos, Havoc integrate capabilities to advance maritime and air autonomy
data.description: In a bid to enhance operational capability, defense technology leaders are joining forces to integrate systems and foster collaborative autonomy. The collaboration, announced in National Harbor, Md. on April 20, 2026, brings together Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) and Havoc. This partnership aims to combine unmanned systems with collaborative autonomy to accelerate advancements in defense technology.

data.title: Regeneron Announces Investor Conference Presentations
data.description: On April 20, 2026, in Tarrytown, New York, Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) announced that they will be hosting a webcast featuring their management team. This event is scheduled for a future date and will be streamed online for all stakeholders and investors to access.

data.title: Cytokinetics Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(C)(4)
data.description: Cytokinetics, Incorporated disclosed on April 20, 2026, that they have provided stock options for the acquisition of 49,358 common shares and 32,734 restricted stock units (RSUs) to 33 recently onboarded employees. The employees, who joined in March and April 2026, were granted these incentives as part of their employment agreement.

data.title: Carlyle Credit Income Fund Schedules Second Quarter Financial Results and Investor Conference Call
data.description: Carlyle Credit Income Fund, also known as CCIF and listed on NYSE as CCIF, disclosed plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2026 on Tuesday, May 19, 2026, post market closure. Following this disclosure, the company will conduct a conference call at 10:00 a.m. EST on Wednesday, May 20, 2026, to further elaborate on the results.

data.title: FibroBiologics Compliant with All Nasdaq Listing Requirements
data.description: On April 20, 2026, FibroBiologics, Inc. (Nasdaq: FBLG), a clinical-stage biotechnology firm, shared that it has 270+ patents issued and pending. The company focuses on creating therapeutics and potential cures for chronic illnesses using fibroblasts and related materials. The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC has verified FibroBiologics' compliance with all relevant criteria for staying listed on The Nasdaq Capital Market. This includes meeting the $2.5 million stockholders’ equity criterion and the $1.00 bid price requirement.

data.title: Nektar Therapeutics Announces Proposed Public Offering
data.description: In San Francisco today, a biotechnology company known as Nektar Therapeutics (Nasdaq: NKTR) revealed their launch of an underwritten public offering totaling $250 million. The company, specializing in immunotherapy medicines, is in the clinical stage of development.
Flywire will report Q1 2026 earnings on May 5, 2026.

data.title: Allegiant Announces Future Board Composition Following Sun Country Acquisition
data.description: Allegiant Travel Company has revealed the expected composition of its Board of Directors after acquiring Sun Country Airlines. Following the acquisition, the Allegiant Board will increase in size from eight members to eleven. The announcement was made on April 20, 2026, through a press release. Allegiant Travel Company is listed on the NASDAQ with the ticker symbol ALGT, while Sun Country Airlines is also traded on the NASDAQ under the symbol SNCY. This move marks a significant development within the airline industry, signaling growth and potential strategic realignment.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- GLD/
data.description: GLD and Tempter are collaborating on a special limited-edition 4/20 collection, combining luxury jewelry with THC beverage culture. The launch took place on April 20, 2026. The press release initially distributed contained errors, and here is the revised version with more information.
